title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - CP-1
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: CP-1 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control CP-1 in the Contingency Planning family. The control title for CP-1 is Contingency Planning Policy and Procedures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: RA-5 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, RA-5, belongs to the Risk Assessment family and is titled Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
